hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/7ae7ceee-4303-4e8b-9524-cec70d2ac35b' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body ([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes((ConvertTo-Json @{msg_type='text';content=@{text='✅ Claude Code 任务完成'}} -Compress)))"
